quicksight.analysis.itemslimitconfigurat: The limit configuration of the visual display for an axis.

quicksight.analysis.itemslimitconfigurat.Description: The limit on how many items of a field are showed in the chart. For example, the number of slices that are displayed in a pie chart.
The `Show other` of an axis in the chart. Choose one of the following options:  +  `INCLUDE` +  `EXCLUDE`
